name: DSwiss Inc
summary: PART I Corporate History DSwiss, Inc. (the Company), a Nevada corporation, was incorporated on May 28, 2015. The Company operates through its wholly-owned subsidiary, DSwiss Holding Limited, incorporated in Seychelles. The Company and its subsidiaries are primarily engaged in the supply of high-quality health and beauty products. These include weight management beverages, anti-aging solutions, and immune system enhancers designed to promote overall health and well-being. The Company conducts its...
